description: Proof signals for project manager, technical project manager, and program manager roles. Designed to capture genuine PM/PgM experience signals from CVs — matrix management, delivery ownership, cross-functional coordination, risk management, and technical bridging.

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed projects end-to-end from initiation through delivery and closure
proof_signals.context: End-to-end project ownership indicates core PM capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Led cross-functional teams in a matrix environment
proof_signals.context: Matrix leadership is a core PM skill — influencing without direct authority

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed project timelines, milestones, risks, and deliverables
proof_signals.context: Core PM execution — timeline and risk management

proof_signals.signal_text: Communicated project status, risks, and decisions to senior leadership or C-level executives
proof_signals.context: Executive-level stakeholder communication indicates senior PM capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Used project management tools (Jira, Monday, Asana, MS Project, Confluence)
proof_signals.context: Tool proficiency supports PM execution

proof_signals.signal_text: Applied Agile, Scrum, Kanban, or hybrid delivery methodologies
proof_signals.context: Methodology experience is expected across PM roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed customer-facing projects or served as primary client contact for project delivery
proof_signals.context: Customer-facing PM experience is highly valued in Israeli B2B tech

proof_signals.signal_text: Identified and mitigated project risks, dependencies, and scope changes
proof_signals.context: Proactive risk management indicates mature PM skills

proof_signals.signal_text: Translated business requirements into technical specifications or actionable plans for engineering teams
proof_signals.context: Business-to-tech translation is core to Technical PM roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Led technical project delivery involving software, APIs, integrations, or system architecture
proof_signals.context: Technical delivery experience distinguishes Technical PMs from general PMs

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed multiple concurrent projects or programs in parallel
proof_signals.context: Multi-project management indicates program-level capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed program budgets, P&L, or resource allocation across projects
proof_signals.context: Budget and P&L ownership distinguishes program managers from project managers

proof_signals.signal_text: Coordinated hardware, software, and multidisciplinary engineering deliverables
proof_signals.context: Multi-domain coordination is common in Israeli defense and deep tech program management

proof_signals.signal_text: Participated in pre-sale or post-sale activities as part of project delivery
proof_signals.context: Pre/post-sale involvement expands PM role scope beyond pure delivery

proof_signals.signal_text: Led project or program governance including escalation management and resolution
proof_signals.context: Governance and escalation management indicates senior PM/PgM capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Built and maintained project dashboards, reports, or executive presentations
proof_signals.context: Reporting and dashboarding supports PM transparency and communication

proof_signals.signal_text: Drove process improvements or optimized project management practices
proof_signals.context: Process improvement signals mature PM who goes beyond execution

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed onboarding or implementation projects for new customers or merchants
proof_signals.context: Onboarding/implementation PM is common in Israeli SaaS companies

proof_signals.signal_text: Served as Product Owner in agile teams
proof_signals.context: PO experience in agile teams signals Technical PM capability

proof_signals.signal_text: BSc in Industrial Engineering and Management or related field
proof_signals.context: Standard educational background for PM roles in Israel

proof_signals.signal_text: PMP certification or similar project management certification
proof_signals.context: PMP is valued but not required in Israeli tech PM roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Experience managing projects in cybersecurity, defense, or regulated environments
proof_signals.context: Domain-specific PM experience in Israel's strong defense and cyber sectors

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed international or cross-border projects with global teams
proof_signals.context: International project management is common in Israeli companies selling globally

proof_signals.signal_text: IDF background in operations, logistics, or command roles
proof_signals.context: Military operations and command experience is commonly accepted as relevant PM background in Israel
